page: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 32 physical cores with multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, offering 3780 GB of local disk capacity with Premium Storage capability, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark evaluations place the D64ads_v6 in the top tier for single-core CPU performance and multi-core Geekbench scores, alongside top-tier image processing and small-model LLM prompt processing. Multi-core CPU performance, cached memory read bandwidth, and large-block memory write bandwidth fall into the strong top 25% category. However, a performance tradeoff is observed in uncached large-block read memory bandwidth and single-threaded compression tasks, which register in the average middle 50% tier. Large-model LLM inference also operates at average speeds.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D64ads_v6 provides high resource density by combining a high-frequency dedicated AMD processor with substantial local storage capacity. This balance of compute, memory, and local disk space makes it suitable for database operations, software compilation, static web serving, and medium-scale LLM inference workloads. It is less optimal for workloads requiring specialized GPU acceleration or massive memory-to-CPU ratios.
description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v6 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz under Microsoft Hyper-V, it includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Hardware-assisted cryptography and vector extensions like AVX-512 are fully supported. Benchmark data indicates top-tier single-core CPU performance and multi-core Geekbench scores, with strong multi-core CPU and cached memory write performance. Tradeoffs include average uncached large-block memory read bandwidth and average performance on large-model LLM inference. This server is suited for database operations, software compilation, static web serving, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage. It delivers top-tier single-core CPU and strong database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 64 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering top-tier single-core CPU performance.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC compute, substantial local storage, and top-tier single-core processing capabilities.

256.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU
3780 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core CPU and multi-core Geekbench performance
Suited for database operations, software compilation, and web serving
